About: It is about a Belgian DJ duo composed of brothers Dimitri Thivaios and Michael Thivaios.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with the record label Smash the House.
ConsistsOf: It consists of brothers Dimitri Thivaios and Michael Thivaios.
DirectedBy: It was directed by Belgian directors Adil El Arbi and Bilall Fallah.
HasA: It has a record label named Smash the House.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by being ranked No. 1 on DJ Mag's Top 100 DJs list in 2015 and 2019.
HeldIn: It was held in Ibiza at Amnesia.
It was held in Ibiza at Ushuaïa Ibiza.
IsA: It is a Belgian DJ duo.
It is a supergroup consisting of Dimitri Vegas & Like Mike and American DJ Steve Aoki.
KnownAs: It is known by the stage names Dimitri Vegas and Like Mike.
KnownFor: It is known for being ranked No. 1 on DJ Mag's Top 100 DJs list in 2015 and 2019.
It is known for performing at numerous festivals worldwide.
It is known for being the official resident DJs at Tomorrowland since 2010.
It is known for holding summer DJ residencies in Ibiza.
It is known for running the record label Smash the House.

It is known for collaborating with artists that include Afrojack, Armin van Buuren, Daddy Yankee, David Guetta, Era Istrefi, Fatboy Slim, Gucci Mane, Hardwell, Martin Garrix, Paris Hilton, Steve Angello, Sebastian Yatra, Kid Ink and Nmixx.
It is known for remixing artists such as Lady Gaga, the Chainsmokers and (G)I-dle.
It is known for releasing their first single in 2009, "Liquid Skies" under the alias Dnm.
It is known for writing the official anthem for the 2010 edition of Tomorrowland, "Tomorrow (Give in to the Night)".
It is known for writing the Tomorrowland anthems up to the 2014 edition.
OccurredAt: It occurred at Amnesia.
It occurred at Ushuaïa Ibiza.
It occurred at Antwerp's Sportpaleis.
It occurred at Veltins Arena in Gelsenkirchen, Germany.
It occurred at Liverpool.
It occurred at New York.
It occurred at Ultra Music Festival.
It occurred at TomorrowWorld.
It occurred at Creamfields.
It occurred at Untold.
OccurredDuring: It occurred during the 2010 edition of Tomorrowland.
It occurred during the 2013 edition of Tomorrowland.
It occurred during the 2014 edition of Tomorrowland.
It occurred during the 2015 edition of Amsterdam Dance Event.
It occurred during the 2018 edition of Tomorrowland.
It occurred during the 2019 edition of Tomorrowland.
It occurred during the 2020 edition of Tomorrowland.
It occurred during the 2021 edition of Tomorrowland.
It occurred during the 2023 edition of Tomorrowland.
PartOf: It is part of the supergroup 3 Are Legend.
PublishedAs: It was published as "Tomorrow (Give in to the Night)".
It was published as "Chattahoochee".
It was published as "Tremor".
It was published as "The Hum".
It was published as "Higher Place".
It was published as "Hey Baby".
It was published as "Complicated".
It was published as "He's a Pirate".
It was published as "When I Grow Up".
It was published as "Bounce".
PublishedIn: It was published in The Netherlands.
UsedAs: It is used as an Elusive Target in the video game Hitman III.
UsedFor: It is used for DJ residencies in Ibiza.
UsedIn: It is used in the Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales movie.
It is used in the Belgian movie Gangsta.
It is used in the video game Hitman III.
It is used in the Elusive Target Arcade Mode.
UsedTo: It is used to make their first steps as DJs.
It is used to make appearances in small clubs.
It is used to be resident BeatFM radio DJs.
It is used to tour Europe.
It is used to be a resident in major clubs in Ibiza.
It is used to write the official anthem for the 2010 edition of Tomorrowland.
It is used to write the Tomorrowland anthems up to the 2014 edition.
It is used to release their first single in 2009.
It is used to score their first Belgian number one.
It is used to finish runners-up in DJ Mag's top 100 DJ poll.
